'''ganate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kerwallop|kerwallop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kerwallop|kerwallop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ganate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ganate|ganate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ganatesher|ganatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ganatesherĂ«m|ganatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ganatero|ganatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ganateshĂ«|ganateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ganateshĂ«m|ganateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiganatero|gokiganatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiganateshĂ«|gokiganateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiganateshĂ«m|gokiganateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goganankerom|goganankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goganankeshĂ«|goganankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goganankeshĂ«m|goganankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goganankeya|goganankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ganaterom|ganaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ganatemu|ganatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ganateya|ganateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiganaterom|gokiganaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiganatemu|gokiganatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiganateya|gokiganateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gananate|gananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gananatesher|gananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gananatesherĂ«m|gananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gananatero|gananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gananateshĂ«|gananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gananateshĂ«m|gananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigananatero|gokigananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigananateshĂ«|gokigananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigananateshĂ«m|gokigananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogananankerom|gogananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogananankeshĂ«|gogananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogananankeshĂ«m|gogananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogananankeya|gogananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gananaterom|gananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gananatemu|gananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gananateya|gananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigananaterom|gokigananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigananatemu|gokigananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigananateya|gokigananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠte|gĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠtesher|gĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠtero|gĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠnĂŠtero|gokigĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠterom|gĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠtemu|gĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠnĂŠteya|gĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠnĂŠterom|gokigĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠnĂŠteya|gokigĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafnafte|gafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafnaftesher|gafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafnaftesherĂ«m|gafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafnaftero|gafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafnafteshĂ«|gafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafnafteshĂ«m|gafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafnaftero|gokigafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafnafteshĂ«|gokigafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafnafteshĂ«m|gokigafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafnafnkerom|gogafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafnafnkeshĂ«|gogafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafnafnkeshĂ«m|gogafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafnafnkeya|gogafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafnafterom|gafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafnaftemu|gafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafnafteya|gafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafnafterom|gokigafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafnaftemu|gokigafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafnafteya|gokigafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
